clue: React, tense, met with resistance – all agitated. Wind it in!
explanation: REACT with T (tense) and R (resistance), all agitated (anagrammed), gives RETRACT, meaning "wind it in".
hints: "All agitated" is telling us that all of the letters we get from the wordplay form an anagram.
"Tense" can be represented by T, and "resistance" can be represented by R.
